current.title: geoTracker — free-tier SEO + GEO rank tracker
current.summary: A zero-cost SEO + GEO pipeline, driven through Claude. The model writes the diagnostics; I review and ship. Shipped so far: SERP rank pulls via Brave API with a DuckDuckGo fallback, a rule-based on-page auditor that scores pages 0–100, and a fix generator that emits paste-ready meta tags, JSON-LD, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, and llms.txt — plus IndexNow pings so Bing reindexes within minutes. 42 keywords tracked, daily diff reports, brand-mention detection. Building now: competitor page scrapes, weekly content-gap reports, LLM citation tracking (does ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity actually mention us?), and a cron loop so the whole pipeline runs untouched.

completed.title: On-page audit + fix-generator loop
completed.summary: Built rule-based defect detector (onpage_audit.py) and a fix generator that emits paste-ready patches: head snippets, JSON-LD, robots.txt, sitemap.xml, llms.txt. First run on jadedviber.com: score 36/100, 12 defects.

completed.title: jadedviber.com SEO foundation
completed.summary: Shipped the patches: meta + Open Graph + Twitter Card + WebSite/Person JSON-LD on index.html, plus robots.txt/sitemap.xml/llms.txt at site root. Generated a 1200×630 og.png via headless chrome from a styled template. Audit score: 36/100 → 98/100.

completed.title: geoTracker scaffold
completed.summary: Free-tier SEO/GEO tracker scaffolded. Brave Search API + DuckDuckGo fallback for SERP, SQLite for storage, daily rank diff + weekly content-gap reports. Anti-spam guardrails baked into the workflow.
